title: Fresh Leaves
description: Adds bushy leaves for Fresh Textures
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4852dee695d0c0c406748558d5b9821795003ad7_0.webp)
**Fresh Leaves** — is an addon for Fresh Textures that adds lush foliage. The resourcespak can also be used NOT ONLY with Fresh Textures.

![1](https://i.postimg.cc/2819wYCC/1111111111gdfgdfgdf-2.png)

## ⚙️ Install guide
For full compatibility, it is recommended to use the «[Fresh Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-textures)» resourcepack lower than the «[Fresh Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-leaves)» resourcepack.

1. Download «[Fresh Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-textures)»
2. Download «[Fresh Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-leaves)»
3. Install the packs in this order

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98707af80c898fbc02284c9a7366385544b5c78.png)
